body_upright_min.name: Body upright threshold
body_upright_min.description: Hips must be this far below shoulders (negative = fisheye OK)

leg_raise_margin.name: Leg-raise suppression margin
leg_raise_margin.description: Suppress gestures when ankle/knee rises this far above hip (0=disable)

snap_forearm_min.name: Snap forearm threshold
snap_forearm_min.description: Forearm must be this vertical (0.10 recommended) to classify as SNAP

wave_lateral_fraction.name: Wave lateral fraction
wave_lateral_fraction.description: Wrist must be this fraction of frame width off-centre for a WAVE to fire
